Document: # Core Rule 1 - Don't be a jerk, a bigot, or inappropriate. - Boomer Station does not allow racism, sexism, homophobia, bigotry, ableism or sexual content including in-character or fictional versions of it. Any usage of slurs, or methods to bypass any text filters is prohibited. Likewise, IRL politics have no place on Monkestation. We are a light-hearted and goofy server; toxicity in any form is not tolerated.
